title: Tiberian Factions for Red Alert
description:
Adds [b]GDI[/b] and [b]Nod[/b] as new playable factions in Command & Conquer: Red Alert Remastered, alongside the original Allies and Soviets.

[b]Early access (v0.50).[/b] GDI and Nod have complete [b]building[/b] line-ups with their own voices and sounds, and they now look correct in both Remastered and classic graphics. Units are still the original Red Alert ones for now — the Tiberian Dawn unit roster is coming in a later release.

[h2]What's new in v0.50[/h2]
[list]
[*] [b]Classic graphics now look right[/b] — GDI and Nod buildings show their proper colours, your team colour shows on them, and the Obelisk fires its proper red laser.
[*] [b]Authentic building sounds[/b] — GDI and Nod buildings use their original Tiberian Dawn placement and construction sounds.
[*] [b]Their own voices[/b] — GDI and Nod have their own EVA announcer and unit voices.
[*] [b]Complete building line-ups[/b] — every GDI and Nod structure, including the Obelisk of Light, Temple of Nod, Hand of Nod, War Factory, Airstrip, defensive turrets, plus the GDI Ion Cannon and Nod nuclear strike superweapons.
[/list]

[h2]Earlier releases[/h2]
[list]
[*] The Nod Obelisk of Light charges up and fires its iconic laser beam, with its proper sounds.
[*] GDI's Guard Tower fires the original chain gun, and the Obelisk and Nod Turret deal proper damage.
[*] Authentic Tiberian Dawn weapon and construction sounds for GDI and Nod buildings.
[/list]

[h2]Selecting GDI or Nod[/h2]
[list]
[*] Pick [b]Spain[/b] in the skirmish country picker to play as [b]GDI[/b].
[*] Pick [b]Turkey[/b] to play as [b]Nod[/b].
[*] France, Germany, Ukraine, USSR, England, Greece all unchanged — vanilla Allied/Soviet experience.
[/list]

[h2]Carried over from v0.4[/h2]
[list]
[*] [b]Full Nod building catalogue[/b]: Hand of Nod, Airstrip, Gun Turret, SAM Site, Obelisk of Light, Temple of Nod, plus shared Power Plant / Refinery / Silo / Repair Facility.
[*] [b]Nod Airstrip cargo-plane delivery[/b] — vehicles produced from the Nod Airstrip arrive via a C-17 cargo plane that flies in from the east edge, drops the vehicle on the strip, and continues off-map. TD-authentic mechanic.
[*] [b]Full GDI building catalogue[/b] from authentic TD assets: Power Plant, Advanced Power Plant, Barracks, Refinery, Silo, Weapons Factory, Helipad, Comm Center, Repair Facility, Guard Towers, Construction Yard.
[*] TD-authentic build times and costs.
[*] GDI MCV that deploys into a TD-style Construction Yard.
[/list]

[h2]Known limitations[/h2]
[list]
[*] [b]Buildings only[/b] — GDI and Nod still build the underlying Allied/Soviet units (vehicles, infantry, aircraft). TD unit catalogue coming in a future release.
[*] [b]GDI/Nod AI does not work yet[/b] — picking GDI or Nod for a CPU opponent will result in an inactive enemy. Pick Allies/Soviets for the AI for a real skirmish.
[*] [b]Both graphics modes supported[/b] — GDI and Nod now look correct in classic graphics too (fixed in v0.50). Remastered graphics still recommended for the sharpest visuals.
[/list]

[h2]Compatibility[/h2]
[list]
[*] This is a DLL mod — it will not work alongside any other mod that also modifies RedAlert.dll. Disable other DLL mods (e.g. CFE Patch Redux) before enabling this one.
[*] Single-player skirmish tested. Multiplayer not yet tested.
[/list]

[h2]Source & licensing[/h2]
GitHub: https://github.com/lukegibson101/cnc-ra-tiberian-factions
Built on top of [url=https://github.com/TheAssemblyArmada/Vanilla-Conquer]Vanilla Conquer[/url]. DLL source is [b]GPL v3[/b], inherited from EA's 2020 Remastered Collection source release.

[h2]Acknowledgements & inspiration[/h2]
This project doesn't bundle these mods, but their work shaped how we approached the engine. Thanks to:
[list]
[*] [b]Reilsss[/b] — [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2853520457]Reilsss's Command & Conquer in Red Alert[/url] — inspiration for reimagining Red Alert's factions as GDI and Nod, and for how to bring TD's sounds across.
[*] [b]DontCryJustDie[/b] — [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3003163891]TD-Assets[/url] — TD art and audio surfaced into the RA engine.
[*] [b]JohnnyJigglez[/b] — [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/commandandconquerremastered/mods/21]EMC (Enhanced Modding Capabilities)[/url] — INI-driven extensibility reference.
[*] [b]ChthonVII[/b] — [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2268301299]CFE Patch Redux[/url] — engine-fix reference.
[/list]

Not endorsed by or affiliated with Electronic Arts.
